productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Grey Ultimatum Max Air Compact Backpack
description: Style Note A backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and back, making loads easy to carry while keeping you looking cool and confident. Fill this versatile nike backpack with your laptop and office essentials, sportswear when you're heading to the field or gym, or use it on a trek in the great outdoors, and enjoy the ample storing space for all your gear. Product Details A grey and black backpack with orange highlights and a Nike swoosh in the front Two Max Air air padded shoulder straps with one short handle on top and air padded back One main zippered compartment with and internal elasticised laptop sleeve enough to hold a 15 inch laptop One zippered compartment in front with organiser pockets One small compartment at the back which opens on the right side Two open mesh pockets on the sides Material and Care 68% nylon and 32% polyester exteriors with 100% nylon lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 45 cm Width: 31 cm Depth: 19 cm
